visual_description: A close-up shot focuses on a man in the passenger seat of a car. He has dark, slightly disheveled hair and a look of intense concentration. He holds his hand, which is wrapped in white tape, up near his face, partially obscuring it. In the blurred background, another man with a shaved head sits in the driver's seat, looking forward. The interior of the car is dark, and through the window, a blurry, green, outdoor environment is visible. A watermark with Chinese characters, "风行网," is present in the upper left corner of the frame. The camera remains steady, maintaining a tight focus on the passenger's face and hand. A man speaks in a low, intense, and menacing voice, his tone filled with a threatening and challenging edge. He begins by addressing someone directly, "Brother, ah." His voice then drops to a near-whisper as he delivers a chilling proposition, "It's an undercover agent. Do you dare to kill him?" The scene cuts to a close-up of the man in the driver's seat. He has a shaved head and is looking slightly to his right, off-camera, with a serious and focused expression. He is wearing a black shirt. The background remains the same, showing
